executives.name: Scott Melbye
executives.background: Mr. Melbye is a 40-year veteran of the nuclear energy industry having held numerous senior management and board positions in the uranium mining industry. He is currently the Executive Vice President of Uranium Energy Corp. and was formerly the President of the Uranium Producers of America. He also serves as an advisor to the CEO of Kazatomprom.

executives.name: Josephine Man
executives.background: Ms. Man has over 20 years of experience in finance and accounting. She was previously the Chief Financial Officer of several publicly traded companies and has extensive experience in financial reporting, internal controls, and corporate finance.

executives.name: Samuel Sharratt
executives.background: Mr. Sharratt has experience in corporate development and investor relations within the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Amir Adnani
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Adnani is the founder and Chairman of Uranium Royalty Corp. He is also the President, CEO, and a director of Uranium Energy Corp. and the Chairman of GoldMining Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Melbye
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Melbye is the CEO and a director of the Company. He has extensive experience in the uranium industry.

board_of_directors.name: Vina Celina
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Celina is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate governance.

board_of_directors.name: Neil Gregson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gregson is a qualified mining engineer with over 30 years of experience in the resources sector, including roles at J.P. Morgan Asset Management.

board_of_directors.name: Geoffrey Kritzinger
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kritzinger is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the investment industry.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Management and Board Profiles
